category_sources: source_facts.description says Vector Optimized Library of Kernels; official libvolk.org says VOLK provides optimized math routines targeting SIMD processors.
display_name_sources: Official libvolk.org homepage uses VOLK and Vector-Optimized Library of Kernels; source_facts.name is volk.
docs_sources: Official libvolk.org links Documentation and hosts Doxygen/kernel documentation and platform kernel documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/gnuradio/volk, so repo is intentionally not redetermined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies optimized kernels; official libvolk.org/GitHub README describes SIMD math kernels and GNU Radio association.
